name: Maria Minerva
description: '''Maria Juur''' (born 15 March 1988), better known by her [[stage name]] '''Maria Minerva''', is an [[Estonian people|Estonian]] musician, producer and DJ based in [[Los Angeles]]. She has recorded mainly for the Los Angeles labels Not Not Fun and its imprint 100% Silk, and in 2015 won two [[Estonian Music Awards]]. Her music is a part of the second wave of [[hypnagogic pop]].
